key_clauses.FAR 15.304: Evaluation factors and significant subfactors — all evaluation factors and significant subfactors that will affect contract award and their relative importance shall be stated in the solicitation.
key_clauses.FAR 15.305: Proposal evaluation — the source selection authority may reject all proposals received in response to a solicitation if doing so is in the best interest of the Government.
key_clauses.FAR 36.6: Architect-Engineer services — applies to environmental engineering services that may overlap with restoration.
key_clauses.FAR 37.601: Performance-based service contracting — preference for performance-based statements of work.
key_clauses.FAR 52.219-14: Limitations on subcontracting — relevant for small business set-asides in restoration work.
key_clauses.FAR 52.236-5: Material and workmanship — applies to construction-related restoration tasks.

environmental_regulations.CWA_404: Clean Water Act Section 404 — requires permits for discharge of dredged or fill material into waters of the US including wetlands.
environmental_regulations.CERCLA: Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act — governs cleanup of contaminated sites.
environmental_regulations.ESA_7: Endangered Species Act Section 7 — requires consultation to ensure actions do not jeopardize listed species.
environmental_regulations.NEPA: National Environmental Policy Act — requires environmental impact assessment for major federal actions.
environmental_regulations.SMCRA: Surface Mining Control and Reclamation Act — regulates active mining and reclamation of abandoned mine lands.
environmental_regulations.33_CFR_332: Compensatory Mitigation Rule — establishes standards for compensatory mitigation for unavoidable wetland losses.
